errors.instructions: Please navigate down and select more specific concepts.

deleteModal.message: Do you want to delete this educational offer?

error.detail: Something went wrong. Try again later or contact the administrator.

info.detail: You copied the educational offer url to clipboard!

tooltips.accessRequired: You can only {{action}} offers from your organization.

description.tooltip: Provide a concise summary or overview of the {{nodeType}} content. Include key topics, purpose, scope, and any important features.
description.label: Description

bok.tooltip: List of Body of Knowledge concepts addressed in the {{nodeType}}.
bok.label: Knowledge Annotations

eqf.tooltip: The European Qualifications Framework. Indicates level of knowledge, skills and competences, from 1 (basic) to 8 (highly specialized).
eqf.label: EQF Level

workload.tooltip: Amount of time expected to invest in order to meet the defined learning outcomes, quantified using ECTS.
workload.label: Workload

duration.tooltip: The total time required to complete this {{nodeType}}.
duration.label: Duration

studyAreas.tooltip: Specific area(s) of study of the {{nodeType}}. Maintained by the UNESCO Institute for Statistics.
studyAreas.label: Study Areas

courseType.tooltip: Select the type of course. This classification determines how the course fits within the curriculum structure.
courseType.label: Course Type

assesment.tooltip: Describe how students will be evaluated in this course. Include assessment methods (exams, projects, participation), grading criteria, and any relevant deadlines or requirements.
assesment.label: Assesment

lecturePractical.tooltip: Specifies whether this lecture is theoretical or practical. Practical lectures involve hands-on activities, labs, or exercises.

affiliations.tooltip: Institutions or organizations associated with this {{nodeType}}.
affiliations.label: Affiliations

trainingMaterials.tooltip: Resources and materials used to support the teaching of this {{nodeType}}.
trainingMaterials.label: Training Materials

prerequisites.tooltip: Prerequisites describe the knowledge, skills, qualifications, or experiences that a learner is expected to have before starting this {{nodeType}}.
prerequisites.label: Prerequisites

learningOutcomes.tooltip: Learning outcomes describe the knowledge, skills, qualifications, or experiences that a learner is expected to have after completing this {{nodeType}}.
learningOutcomes.label: Learning Outcomes

bibliography.tooltip: Bibliography describe the recommended reading materials, resources, or references related to this {{nodeType}}.
bibliography.label: Bibliography

transversalSkills.tooltip: Skills considered unrelated to a particular job, task, academic discipline or area of knowledge but that can be used in a wide variety of situations and work settings. Based on the ESCO transversal and cross-sector skills.
transversalSkills.label: Transversal Skills

customTransversalSkills.tooltip: Custom transversal skills related to this {{nodeType}}.
customTransversalSkills.label: Custom Transversal Skills

customSelect.filterPlaceholder: Choose a {{fieldName}} or specify a custom value

filterUserItem.loginRequired: You must be logged in to use this field

eqf.label: EQF Level
eqf.tooltip: The European Qualifications Framework. Indicates level of knowledge, skills and competences, from 1 (basic) to 8 (highly specialized).

organization.label: Organization *
organization.tooltip: The organization under which the offer is to be registered.

division.label: Division
division.tooltip: The organization division under which the offer is to be registered.

isPublic.tooltip: Specifies whether this offer is public or restricted to your account.
